description_long: This object is a medium-sized bird with an elongated, slightly curved beak and a streamlined body. Its plumage is predominantly olive green, with subtle variations in shading along the wings and tail. The bird's eyes are small and pale, standing out against the darker head. The tail is long and tapers to a point, with a slight gradation in color towards the tip. The legs are short and not prominently visible, suggesting they are tucked beneath the body. The overall appearance is sleek and adapted for perching or foraging in urban parks or gardens.
description: A sleek, olive-green bird with a long, curved beak and a pointed tail, featuring subtle color gradations and a streamlined body.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's elongated body, curved beak, and streamlined profile.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the rounded back and the symmetrical, slightly pointed tail feathers.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same elongated body and beak, with subtle shading differences.
description_view_3: Top-down view revealing the full length of the tail and the gradient in plumage color.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid olive green with subtle gradient on wings and tail
